Shashank Prasanna

Talking Engineer. Product Marketer. Machine Learner.

Twitter LinkedIn Github Last.fm Flickr

About me

I’m an Engineer.

Currently, I work as the product marketing manager for MATLAB Statistics and Machine Learning products. (Check out some of the cool things we’re building to make machine learning easy for engineers and domain experts)

Before that, I did research on non-linear dynamics and chaotic time series. Think statistics, information theory and machine learning applied to ‘big’ time series (EEG) data. (Some of us have been doing data science and big data before it had names)

My most recent facination has been with Deep Learning (Convolutional Neural Networks) and more generally machine learning applications for computer vision problems.

I can’t recommend this wonderful package for CNNs by Vedaldi and Lenc: MatConvNet: CNNs for MATLAB

The following are my areas of interest and technical expertise:

  • Machine Learning
  • Deep Learning (for Computer Vision)
  • Bayesian Statistics
  • Time Series Analysis (modeling and forecasting)
  • Optimization (nonlinear and global)
